887980241.en_literal:
I'll break this down step by step:

1. First, identify the speaker: The speaker is Percival (パーシヴァル).

2. The Japanese line is: このまま崩すぞ！ (Kono mama kuzusu zo!)

3. Break down the Japanese:
   - このまま (kono mama) = "like this" or "as is"
   - 崩すぞ (kuzusu zo) = "I'll destroy it" or "I'll bring it down"

4. The phrase is a battle cry showing determination to destroy something.

5. The context mentions this is during a skill

393098811.jp_real: ヒルムド！このまま取り付く！
393098811.english: Hold fast! We shall not cower!

4697876.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
4697876.jp_real: まだだ！決して気を抜くな！
4697876.en_literal: I'm not done yet! I won't lose my cool!
4697876.english: Keep fighting until the very end!

1006823328.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_B
1006823328.en_literal: Victory is right in front of us!

582489734.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
582489734.jp_real: 急所は押さえた！勝負あったぞ！
582489734.en_literal: I've got the pressure point covered. Let's do this!
582489734.english: We've breached its defenses! Now to win the day!

234153213.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
234153213.jp_real: こんな機械兵器が何だというのだ
234153213.en_literal: What kind of mechanical weapon is this?
234153213.english: A walking scrapheap is still a scrapheap.

526192598.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
526192598.jp_real: 我が炎にどこまで耐えられる
526192598.en_literal: How much longer can you endure my flames?
526192598.english: You think my flames can't melt steel?

481928050.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
481928050.jp_real: チッ、うっとうしいことこの上ないぞ！
481928050.en_literal: I've got no choice but to deal with this annoying situation!

671360466.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
671360466.jp_real: クダルン！破壊してくれる！
671360466.english: I'll reduce you to pieces in no time!

940158274.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
940158274.jp_real: 道を空けてもらうぞ！将軍！
940158274.english: Generals do not stand above a lord!

692178264.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
692178264.jp_real: 我らの連携！とことめに焼き付けるがいい！
692178264.en_literal: Our synergy! Let's burn it down!
692178264.english: Our crew hums like a well-oiled engine!

731083388.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
731083388.jp_real: お互いに引くわけにはいかんというわけか
731083388.en_literal: So we're both going to have to fight, then?
731083388.english: We shall be the ones to prevail!

162387785.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
162387785.jp_real: どうした？さあ、反撃してみせる！
162387785.en_literal: What's wrong? I'll show you my counterattack!
162387785.english: There's plenty more where that came from!

339727526.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
339727526.jp_real: 覚悟はできているの。行くぞ！
339727526.english: You reap what you sow, Eid.

480290320.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
480290320.jp_real: ジャマだてするのならば、容赦はせん！
480290320.en_literal: If you're going to interfere, I won't forgive you!
480290320.english: Enough, Id! Even a fool knows when he's beaten!

252902742.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
252902742.jp_real: 貴様の剣、もはや見切ったぞ！
252902742.en_literal: Your sword... has reached its limit!

141969964.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
141969964.jp_real: モウハヨ。キサマニオクレワトラン。
141969964.en_literal: I'm not backing down from you!
141969964.english: You've had enough fun at our expense!

57862639.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
57862639.jp_real: 我が炎と剣で切り開く！
57862639.en_literal: I shall cleave through with my flames and sword!

471661236.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
471661236.jp_real: 結着をつけさせてもらおうか
471661236.en_literal: Let's bring this to a conclusion.

539614338.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
539614338.jp_real: 剣を握っていた方が、お前らしく戦えたのではないか
539614338.en_literal: I could have fought more like you if I had held a sword.
539614338.english: I thought you were a swordsman, yet you discard your blade.

192492051.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
192492051.english: Those dark flames do not bode well.

477924990.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
477924990.jp_real: このプレッシャーは…なんだ！

753921973.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
753921973.jp_real: 決して勝てる相手などではない！
753921973.en_literal: I am no opponent to be easily defeated!
753921973.english: Do not shrink! We must prevail!

256413882.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
256413882.jp_real: やつらの隙を見逃すなよ！
256413882.english: Watch for a pause in its attacks!

574842189.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
574842189.jp_real: 思い知ったか！魔が喰うものめ！
574842189.en_literal: I see through your deception, you corrupt beings!

278294897.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
278294897.jp_real: 吹きすさぶ風に圧倒されるなよ！
278294897.en_literal: Don't get overwhelmed by the wind that blows you away.
278294897.english: This wind is all howl and no bite!

304785727.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
304785727.jp_real: よし！このまま畳みかける！
304785727.english: Now then, let us drive back this fiend!

585369093.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
585369093.jp_real: 我らの優勢は屈しない！行くぞ！
585369093.en_literal: Our superiority is absolute! Let's go!
585369093.english: We shall reign supreme over this wretch!

805963588.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_C
805963588.jp_real: 今のが致命打となるはずだ
805963588.en_literal: This is the moment that will become your epitaph!
805963588.english: It should be on its last legs!

136187006.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
136187006.jp_real: いいとめ。ルリアを守ってくれたことには感謝しておく。
136187006.en_literal: I'll hold back. I'm grateful you protected Lyria.
136187006.english: I'm not done with you, Id. But at the very least, thanks for covering Lyria.

819329714.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
819329714.jp_real: 気にいらん霊気を発する

898338912.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
898338912.jp_real: うまくいったか。見事だ、お前たち。
898338912.en_literal: Did it work? Good job, you guys.
898338912.english: I never doubted our prowess for a second!

522904631.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
522904631.jp_real: このまま喰らい尽くす！
522904631.english: We shall slay this feral beast!

738174245.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
738174245.jp_real: エンテイのゴウカにヤカレルガイ！
738174245.en_literal: I'd rather be burned by the flames of the end!
738174245.english: My flames or the fires of hell!

647357816.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
647357816.jp_real: こちらも負けてはいらぬ！
647357816.en_literal: I can't afford to lose either.

344817734.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
344817734.jp_real: 同じ要領で次も仕掛けるぞ！
344817734.en_literal: I'll hit the next one with the same technique!

87990695.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
87990695.jp_real: 心配はいらん。俺に続け！
87990695.en_literal: No need to worry. Leave it to me!

1003969680.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
1003969680.jp_real: ここを突破すれば、頂上は近い！
1003969680.en_literal: If we break through here, the summit is close!
1003969680.english: End this! The summit lies just ahead!

463591694.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
463591694.jp_real: 今さら、恐れるものは何もない。

324996171.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
324996171.jp_real: エンテイのワザのすべてを見せてやる！
324996171.en_literal: I'll show you all the techniques of the infinite!
324996171.english: I shall wager my very soul!

485645594.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
485645594.jp_real: なんとしても食い止めるぞ！
485645594.en_literal: I'll stop you no matter what!

694453049.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
694453049.jp_real: ショウキ！このまま攻めろ！

687155432.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
687155432.jp_real: アンラマンユウ。今度は倒してみせる。
687155432.en_literal: I'll show you what I'm made of. This time, I'll definitely defeat you!
687155432.english: Your day of reckoning has come, Angra Mainyu!

381295579.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
381295579.jp_real: 悪党めが。観念するがいい！
381295579.en_literal: I'll take that as a challenge!
381295579.english: Your villainous deeds shall not go unpunished!

483006954.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
483006954.jp_real: 我が炎に続け！勝利は目線だ！
483006954.en_literal: By my flame, continue! Victory is our goal!
483006954.english: My flames light the way to victory!

1007167060.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
1007167060.jp_real: リリス！無様な姿と思わんのか！
1007167060.en_literal: You think I'm in a pitiful state?
1007167060.english: Lilith! Are you so blind as to what you have become?

845930841.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
845930841.jp_real: これが絆の力というものなのか
845930841.en_literal: So this is what the power of bonds is...
845930841.english: There is power in unity. That much is certain.

349988329.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
349988329.jp_real: ここまできたなら、最後まで面倒を見てやるか。
349988329.en_literal: If you've come this far, I might as well see you through to the end.
349988329.english: It deserves a second chance. Let us be the ones to give it to him.

1012761406.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
1012761406.jp_real: 気に食わん奴だったが、ミスてるわけにはいかん。
1012761406.en_literal: He was a tough one, but I can't afford to miss.
1012761406.english: Though I chafe at Id's disposition, I will not abandon him.

284149725.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
284149725.jp_real: 攻撃し続ける！隙を見せろ！
284149725.en_literal: Keep attacking! I'll cover your back!

889266584.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
889266584.jp_real: 我が炎、神をも焼き尽くさん！
889266584.en_literal: My flames will burn even the gods!
889266584.english: Even a god cannot stave off my flames!

116598270.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
116598270.jp_real: エンテイのチカラ！ドクトミユ！
116598270.en_literal: The power of the infinite! I'll take you down!
116598270.english: Behold the might of the Lord of Flames!

225838600.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_A
225838600.en_literal: I'm getting hot for the fight!

1060988525.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
1060988525.en_literal: You think you can match me?
1060988525.english: Never send a pawn after a king!

644823968.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
644823968.jp_real:
三回して迎撃しろ！  
敵に囲まれぬよう立ち回れ！
644823968.en_literal: Flammenmarsch! Macht! Zerreissen! Royal Authority! Feuerangriff! Roter Wirbel! Traumerei! X-Seele! Flammen Rustung! Adrenaline Rush! Lohenwolf!
644823968.english: Stay on the move! Don't let them surround us!

666697524.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
666697524.jp_real: 我が炎で焼き払ってくれるわ！猛龍殿！
666697524.en_literal: I'll burn it all away with my flames. Don't worry.
666697524.english: Embrace my fire! Return from whence you came!

1048995566.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
1048995566.jp_real: やつのもとへ守りを近づけさせぬ！
1048995566.en_literal: I'll bring the shield to him!
1048995566.english: Spare these foul creatures no quarter!

539079805.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
539079805.jp_real: 今は前を見て進むしかあるまい
539079805.en_literal: I can only move forward by looking ahead.
539079805.english: The road ahead is long, but we must press on.

344318245.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
344318245.jp_real: ゼーガの空にも馴染んできた頃か
344318245.en_literal: Even Zeta's sky has grown familiar to me.
344318245.english: I've grown accustomed to fighting in these skies.

541481902.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
541481902.jp_real: ギリスをあぶりだすぞ！

344718075.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
344718075.jp_real: そうひょうどもが、ちり！
344718075.english: You sheep follow the wrong shepherd!

38577667.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
38577667.jp_real: 戦意なき者は下がっている
38577667.english: There is no meaning in your cause!

807515362.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
807515362.jp_real: この規模の城を陥落させるとはな。強断め。
807515362.en_literal: To conquer a castle of this scale... Impressive.
807515362.english: This castle has stood the test of time. It won't fall to Avia!

1057479833.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
1057479833.jp_real: 何が相手だろうが関係ない！
1057479833.en_literal: It doesn't matter what the opponent is!

828457197.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
828457197.jp_real: 我が行進を止められるか！

341910305.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
341910305.jp_real: まだ力は温存しておけ
341910305.en_literal: I'll hold back my power for now.

117919666.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
117919666.jp_real: まったくもって悪趣味が過ぎる
117919666.en_literal: I'm completely overwhelmed by the sheer amount of malice.

394314904.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_A
394314904.jp_real: この程度で、炎帝の炎は全員！
394314904.en_literal: Even this much, the flames of the horizon will never die!
394314904.english: Underestimate my flames at your own peril.

326078885.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_1
326078885.jp_real: お前たち、なかなかやるな

966771358.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_2
966771358.jp_real: みんなのもの、よくやった！

538927241.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
538927241.jp_real: みんな、いい連携だった

940483758.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_2
940483758.jp_real: 全員の呼吸が合っていたな

624268672.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
624268672.jp_real: 今の動きは理想的だったな

305544283.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1
305544283.jp_real: 行くぞ！みんなついてこれるな！

504744793.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
504744793.en_literal: Not yet! Don't let your guard down!

115042473.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
115042473.jp_real: まだまだこんなものではないはずだ。俺たちの力を！
115042473.en_literal: There's no way something like this is enough! Our power!
115042473.english: Stay at the ready! War never sleeps!

264703668.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
264703668.jp_real: ふん。いい気があったな。
264703668.english: To act in concert is a thing of beauty.

861592915.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
861592915.jp_real: ああ、次も期待している
861592915.english: I expect much from my vassals.

117514703.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_2
117514703.jp_real: この程度、ぞうさもない

583384313.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
583384313.en_literal: I can't let you get away with this.
583384313.english: Hah! Are there no limits to your power?

510590006.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
510590006.english: Your ice could freeze the blood of a dragon.

191952746.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0500
191952746.jp_real: レンドの高さが伺える
191952746.en_literal: I can sense the height of your resolve.
191952746.english: I've not seen a better shot.

768024285.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
768024285.english: I am grateful for the aid.

1049167713.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
1049167713.jp_real: ふん。腕は落ちていないようだな。
1049167713.en_literal: Hmph. Your arm doesn't seem to have dropped.
1049167713.english: Seems your blade has not lost its edge.

28082952.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0900
28082952.jp_real: 少しはマシになったようだな。
28082952.en_literal: Looks like you're a bit better.
28082952.english: You are finally of some use.

1012669632.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
1012669632.jp_real: 相変わらずの見事な剣技だ
1012669632.en_literal: Your swordsmanship remains as impressive as ever!
1012669632.english: The years have not dulled your sword.

586212222.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
586212222.jp_real: これがデュミエル聖剣技か
586212222.en_literal: So this is the Dumielle's authority?
586212222.english: Virtue has blessed your blade, Knight of Lumiel.

471657150.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
471657150.jp_real: 卓越した剣技の数々。目を見張るものがあるな。
471657150.en_literal: The sheer number of exceptional swordsmen... There's someone worth watching.

323737309.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
323737309.jp_real: 伝説はダテではないということか
323737309.en_literal: So the legend is no lie.
323737309.english: It seems the yarns about you are threaded with truth.

564891928.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
564891928.jp_real: 負けられないという顔をしているな
564891928.en_literal: You've got that "can't lose" look on your face.

584647045.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
584647045.jp_real: 攻撃の手を緩めるなよ
584647045.en_literal: Don't let up on the offense!

291939853.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
291939853.jp_real: さすがにやるな、サンダルフォン。
291939853.english: As expected of the almighty Sandalphon.

128355602.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
128355602.jp_real: 十天衆の剣技、さすがと言える
128355602.en_literal: The swordsmanship of a ten-point master. You could say it's impressive.
128355602.english: I expected excellence, and that's what I received.

352548554.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
352548554.jp_real: 鋭い一撃。狙いも正確だな。
352548554.en_literal: Sharp instincts. Your aim's accurate too.
352548554.english: Your arrows are sharp, your aim is true.

878802081.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
878802081.jp_real: その調子だ！俺についてこい！
878802081.english: Well executed. I lead, you follow!

457946717.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
457946717.jp_real: やけどしたくなければ下がっている
457946717.en_literal: If you don't want to get burned, stay back!
457946717.english: Step back, or you risk injury.

267176726.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
267176726.jp_real: ふむ、相手が不憫に感じるほどだ
267176726.en_literal: Hmph. I can tell the opponent's off-balance.
267176726.english: Hah! I almost pity our foes.

782997297.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_3
782997297.english: It's as if we planned that.

555653069.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
555653069.jp_real: 鋭い剣に華麗な魔法。さすがとしか言いようがない。
555653069.en_literal: A sharp sword and blazing magic... I can only say, "as expected."
555653069.english: Master of both steel and spell is an army unto himself.

495952002.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0100
495952002.jp_real: 今の感覚を忘れるなよ
495952002.en_literal: Don't forget how you feel right now.

237879267.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
237879267.jp_real: このまま一気に押し切るぞ！
237879267.en_literal: I'll crush you all at once!

987119369.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
987119369.jp_real: なるほど。才に恵まれているな。
987119369.en_literal: I see. You're blessed with the sign.
987119369.english: Rare to find such power in one so young.

589151667.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
589151667.en_literal: I'll leave the next one to you.

1030342559.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
1030342559.jp_real: フミコミに少し遠慮があるようだな
1030342559.en_literal: You seem a bit hesitant to commit.

603091031.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
603091031.jp_real: まさか幽霊がこれほど頼もしいとはな。
603091031.en_literal: I never thought a ghost could be so reliable.
603091031.english: Who would've looked for such heart among the dead?

357632637.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
357632637.en_literal: That attack just now was quite something.

440213424.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
440213424.en_literal: You're quite the sight for once.

857344045.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
857344045.jp_real: この町を仕留めていくぞ、ジークフリート！
857344045.english: Siegfried, our work is not yet done.

40298965.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1200
40298965.en_literal: Can you keep up with me again?

893073576.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
893073576.jp_real: 今の状況で合わせてくるとはな。
893073576.en_literal: You're coming at me in this situation?
893073576.english: Your judgment is apt. Your actions swift.

1058338743.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
1058338743.jp_real: やけどには気をつけろ

314310833.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
314310833.jp_real: トウシクウケンもアナドレンモロだ
314310833.en_literal: Even the sky of the city is not exempt.
314310833.english: Truly it is not the sword that makes the warrior.

863357265.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
863357265.jp_real: 火は合わさり、炎となる。
863357265.english: Two sparks combine into one flame!

976123594.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
976123594.jp_real: 残り火にも躊躇なく突っ込むとは。
976123594.en_literal: I'll charge in without hesitation, even on the last day.
976123594.english: You would run headlong into an inferno.

851697528.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
851697528.jp_real: まだだ。ついてこれるか？
851697528.en_literal: I'm not done yet. Can you keep up?
851697528.english: Have you strength left for the road ahead?

915010145.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
915010145.jp_real: よし、次だ！俺についてこい！
915010145.english: We'll push our foes beyond the brink of doom.

874575238.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
874575238.jp_real: この炎、決して絶やしてなるものか！
874575238.en_literal: This flame... will never be extinguished!

457644178.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
457644178.jp_real: 理想的な連携だった。次に備えるぞ。
457644178.en_literal: That was an ideal cooperation. Let's prepare for the next one.
457644178.english: Perfect synergy. Now show me again!

23154538.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
23154538.jp_real: 援護は任されるぞ、ソーン！

877950911.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
877950911.jp_real: さあ、指図め。炎狼と白狼の共演というところだな。
877950911.en_literal: So, it's a collaboration between the Crimson and White Dragons, then.
877950911.english: Tis the hour the wolves of flame and silver howl together!

959938623.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
959938623.jp_real: ホオ？今のに合わせるとはな。
959938623.en_literal: Hoh? You're actually keeping up with me.
959938623.english: I half expected you to miss your cue.

418904152.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
418904152.jp_real: まるでジャジャウマのようだが、技は洗練されているな。
418904152.en_literal: You're just like a toy soldier, but your moves are well-practiced.
418904152.english: All the dignity of a donkey, with the strength of an ox.

679371648.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
679371648.en_literal: Next, I'll cut down the vanguard.
679371648.english: I will lead the next assault.

941915740.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
941915740.jp_real: 強い想いがこもった技だ
941915740.en_literal: A technique infused with a strong will.
941915740.english: There is bite within your skill.

1069820491.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
1069820491.jp_real: 我が炎は、深淵の闇すらも照らせるだろうか。
1069820491.en_literal: My flames... will they even light up the deepest darkness?
1069820491.english: No darkness shall smother the light of my flame.

769143632.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_2
769143632.jp_real: このまま攻勢を維持する！

661319133.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_3
661319133.en_literal: I'm not letting my guard down yet.

930917847.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
930917847.jp_real: なるほど。気遣いは不要というわけか。
930917847.en_literal: I see. So you're saying there's no need to worry about it?
930917847.english: I see you have no need of a guardian.

587899772.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0100
587899772.jp_real: 油断するな。次があるぞ。
587899772.en_literal: Don't let your guard down. There's more to come.

378536030.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
378536030.jp_real: 次もこの調子で行くぞ！
378536030.en_literal: I'll take the next one too!
378536030.english: Press on while we have the advantage!

884422046.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
884422046.jp_real: ラカム！もっとやれるだろ！
884422046.english: You've yet strength in reserve, Rackam.

479609093.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
479609093.en_literal: Don't let your guard down yet!
479609093.english: It is not yet time to preen.

725051328.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
725051328.jp_real: 俺の全力はこんなものではない
725051328.en_literal: My full power is not something like this.
725051328.english: That was not the full measure of my skill.

35202672.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
35202672.en_literal: Then, let's prepare for the next one.

957172508.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
957172508.jp_real: 巻き込まれたくなければ下がっている
957172508.en_literal: If you don't want to get involved, then get out of the way!

128657707.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
128657707.jp_real: エンテイのイコウの前にヒレフセ
128657707.en_literal: I won't yield before the end of all things.
128657707.english: All shall bow before the Lord of Flames!

331001152.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
331001152.jp_real: お前には油断などありはしないか
331001152.en_literal: You don't know the meaning of "careless", do you?
331001152.english: Never have I seen you missstep, Siegfried.

739388998.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
739388998.jp_real: 少し火力を絞りすぎたか。
739388998.en_literal: Did I push the firepower too hard?
739388998.english: Perhaps I was overcautious in throttling my flames.

451176392.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
451176392.jp_real: これがエンテイの力だ
451176392.en_literal: This is the power of the abyss.
451176392.english: Fly, or fall to the Lord of Flames.

389151449.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
389151449.english: The winds blow in our favor.

161969495.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
161969495.jp_real: これは権圧か。なんと凄まじい。
161969495.en_literal: This is a sword technique? How amazing!
161969495.english: How does the flesh of a mortal rival undying steel?

402755537.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
402755537.jp_real: ふん。これがアルベスの炎の力か。
402755537.en_literal: Hmph. So this is the power of Albes's flame.
402755537.english: Your spear deserves its lofty reputation.

108416811.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
108416811.jp_real: よく合わせてくれたな
108416811.en_literal: You've got a good connection there.

824204145.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
824204145.jp_real: ハイになりたい奴はドイツだ
824204145.en_literal: I'm not interested in becoming a servant.
824204145.english: All that face me shall turn to ash.

959155304.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
959155304.jp_real: オレの炎で切り開いてみせよ！
959155304.en_literal: I'll cut through with my flames!
959155304.english: I shall light the way in darkness.

461066913.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
461066913.jp_real: シエテ。まさか手を抜いてはいまいや。
461066913.en_literal: Seofon, you wouldn't actually pull out on me, would you?
461066913.english: Seofon, be honest. Were you holding back?

3721939.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
3721939.jp_real: すべてを燃やし尽くす！
3721939.en_literal: I'll burn everything to the ground!
3721939.english: I will burn them all to cinders!

924469849.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
924469849.english: A general who can lead and follow.

87544807.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
87544807.jp_real: 平穏と静寂には程遠い状況か。
87544807.en_literal: Peace and tranquility are far from our current situation.
87544807.english: Securing peace is an arduous task.

770804536.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
770804536.jp_real: おお、悪魔的な強さだな。
770804536.english: You are a fiend on the battlefield.

946251380.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_3
946251380.en_literal: Leave the next one to me.

403620366.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
403620366.jp_real: 俺の理想が遂えぬ限り、決して消えぬ炎だ。
403620366.en_literal: As long as my ideals live on, this flame will never go out.
403620366.english: A forthright will means a steady sword.

238361203.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0100
238361203.jp_real: 好きなだけ暴れてこい
238361203.en_literal: Hmph. Go wild as much as you like.
238361203.english: Of course. Go and wreak havoc.

255052326.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
255052326.jp_real: わずかなスキも逃しません
255052326.en_literal: I won't let even the slightest opening slip by.

996013021.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
996013021.english: You would call me Percy? Hmph. Brave.

562774016.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
562774016.jp_real: 無茶はするな。俺が前に出よう。
562774016.en_literal: Don't be reckless. I'll go first.
562774016.english: Keep to the back line. It's safer there.

475408500.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
475408500.jp_real: イキのあった連携だった。歴戦の鬼騎士の名は伊達ではないな。
475408500.en_literal: That was a well-coordinated link. The name "Master of the Battlefield" isn't just for show.

619947345.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
619947345.jp_real: ああ、次は俺が先陣を切ろう
619947345.en_literal: Alright, I'll lead the way from now on.
619947345.english: Hot as in the heat of battle?

150784281.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
150784281.jp_real: ならばその尊い熱を、我が炎の糧とさせてもらおうか。
150784281.en_literal: Then, shall I make that precious heat my flame's fuel?
150784281.english: And my spirit is as strong as yours. Figuratively.

665607812.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
665607812.jp_real: 嫉妬めそうなるとはお前らしくもない
665607812.en_literal: It's unbecoming of you to lose your composure.
665607812.english: You on the other hand could stand to be fiercer.

517701983.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
517701983.jp_real: おい、ダーケン。どさくさでパーサンなどと呼ぶな。
517701983.en_literal: Hey, you damn fool! Don't you dare call me "Papa"!
517701983.english: I'll not have a mongrel call me Percy.

722762169.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
722762169.jp_real: ふっ、この程度じゃお構いなしだ
722762169.en_literal: Hmph. This is nothing to a beast like me.

80693814.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
80693814.jp_real: これが変幻自在の剣。是非とも手合わせしたいものだ。
80693814.en_literal: This is the sword of divine will. I'd be honored to fight alongside you.
80693814.english: And yet I have never seen a blade like yours.

284004247.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
284004247.en_literal: I'm going to keep moving forward!

17950050.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
17950050.jp_real: 伝説の大剣豪と肩を並べる貴重な機会。無駄にはできん。
17950050.en_literal: An opportunity to stand shoulder to shoulder with a legendary swordsman. I can't afford to waste it.
17950050.english: I must learn what I can from this battle.

419082559.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
419082559.jp_real: おまえの相棒の炎とどっちが上かな？
419082559.en_literal: Your ally's flames... which one's stronger?
419082559.english: Between your partner and I, whose flame burns stronger?

125617981.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
125617981.jp_real: エンテイをあなどってもらっては困る
125617981.en_literal: I'm sorry, but I can't assist with that request.
125617981.english: Then you underestimate the Lord of Flames.

430925137.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
430925137.en_literal: Hmph. You're not the only one.

651824153.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
651824153.jp_real: もっと火力を上げてやっても構わないが
651824153.en_literal: Heh. I don't mind if you turn up the firepower.
651824153.english: Hah. And here you've seen but a flicker of my influence.

888798434.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
888798434.jp_real: ふん。侮ってもらっては困る
888798434.en_literal: I'd be in trouble if you got carried away.
888798434.english: In my case, it's correct to believe the rumors.

412286532.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
412286532.jp_real: おれが出るまでもなかっただろうではないか
412286532.en_literal: Hmph. I didn't think I'd have to step in.
412286532.english: Seems you had the situation under control by yourself.

389319956.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
389319956.jp_real: ふん。申し分ない威力だな。
389319956.english: All the strength and grace of an angry bull.

839109211.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
839109211.jp_real: いつまでも輝ける炎であり続けたいものだ
839109211.en_literal: I want to remain a flame that shines forever.
839109211.english: As long as there are those in need of its light, my fire shall burn on.

473816884.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
473816884.jp_real: 見くびってもらっては困る
473816884.en_literal: I'd be in trouble if you looked down on me.

251526119.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
251526119.jp_real: お前、俺を誰だと思ってる。
251526119.en_literal: Who do you think I am?
251526119.english: Hmph. As well you should be.

157815694.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
157815694.jp_real: ああ、攻めの手を緩めるなよ
157815694.en_literal: Don't let up on the offense.
157815694.english: Indeed. It always consumes my mark.

1018749110.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
1018749110.jp_real: ふん。当然だろ。俺の意思で歩んでいるのだからな。
1018749110.en_literal: Hmph. Of course. I'm walking my path by my own will.
1018749110.english: Of course. My path is lit by an unwavering vision.

841432476.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B
841432476.en_literal: It's not that big of a deal.

937803354.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
937803354.english: Let us carry this passion forward!

592770212.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
592770212.jp_real: ふん。細かいことを気にするな。
592770212.en_literal: Don't worry about the little stuff.
592770212.english: That was not worth your gratitude.

565650517.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0100
565650517.jp_real: ああ、一息に片付けるぞ！
565650517.en_literal: I'll clear everything out in one go!
565650517.english: We shall sweep over them like wildfire.

796935994.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
796935994.jp_real: 希望の灯たる援帝として、当然のことをしたまえだ。
796935994.en_literal: As the torch of hope, I must do what is only natural.
796935994.english: It must... to keep fear and despair at bay.

539959704.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
539959704.jp_real: お前の方こそ、まだいけるだろ。
539959704.en_literal: You're the one who can still go, Rackam.
539959704.english: Hmph. And I thought your eye keener.

891633636.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
891633636.jp_real: ほう？次は全力の炎を俺に見せてくれ
891633636.en_literal: Hoh? Next, show me your flames at full power.
891633636.english: Indeed. You have spirit. That much is certain.

400188484.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
400188484.jp_real: ふん。安心しろ。そのような下手は打たん。
400188484.en_literal: Hmph. Relax. I won't miss like that.
400188484.english: My fire burns only what I wish it to burn.

35903871.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
35903871.jp_real: 当然だ。我が炎は希望の灯火。皆の明日を照らす光だからな。
35903871.en_literal: Of course. My flame is the torch of hope, the light that illuminates everyone's tomorrow.
35903871.english: An inferno brings only destruction, but my flames may kindle hope.

412754212.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
412754212.jp_real: この胸の熱い想いは、誰にも止められまい。
412754212.en_literal: This burning passion in my heart... no one can stop it.
412754212.english: It is as constant as my will.

718087247.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
718087247.jp_real: これがエンテイの力だ
718087247.en_literal: This is the power of the infinite.
718087247.english: I never knew you to be sentimental.

808724953.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
808724953.jp_real: 消し済みにされたいのか？
808724953.english: Well, stir up fire and you will be burned.

650362988.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
650362988.jp_real: まだまだこんなものではないがな。
650362988.en_literal: There's still no way I'm gonna lose to something like this.
650362988.english: I am still but a shadow of what I will become.

309544520.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
309544520.jp_real: ふん。少しでも揺らげば、機嫌に見抜かれるのだろうな。
309544520.en_literal: Hmph. If I so much as falter, I'll be cut down cleanly.

335338341.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
335338341.english: I know how to conserve my strength.

1055862848.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
1055862848.jp_real: おれの炎は、まだまだこんなものではないぞ。
1055862848.en_literal: Hmph. My flames are far from something like this.
1055862848.english: You have not yet seen my full power.

936324611.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
936324611.jp_real: アルベス、なかなかに見事だ
936324611.english: Our verse makes for quite the companion.

601589269.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
601589269.jp_real: バザラガ、俺の炎は魂をも焦がす
601589269.en_literal: My flames will even burn the soul.
601589269.english: My fire burns down to the very soul.

804119261.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
804119261.jp_real: ふむ。開闢の錬金術師の名は、伊達ではないようだな。
804119261.en_literal: Hmph. The name of the alchemist of liberation is no mere coincidence.

775181846.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
775181846.jp_real: だが仲間を導く灯でもある。皆の行く道は俺が照らす。
775181846.en_literal: But I'm also a beacon leading my comrades. I'll light the way for everyone.
775181846.english: As long as we are allies, my flame will not harm, but guide you.

347746914.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
347746914.jp_real: ああ、計算通りだ。次に備えるぞ。
347746914.en_literal: Huh. As expected. Let's prepare for what comes next.
347746914.english: I would have it no other way. Now, on to the next foe.

301244192.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
301244192.jp_real: お前こそ、そろそろ本気を出したらどうだ。天星剣王。
301244192.en_literal: You should probably start showing your true power. Heaven's Sword King.
301244192.english: Actually, I'm still waiting for the Star-Sword Sovereign to show his true colors.

47399840.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
47399840.jp_real: この炎が燃え続ける限り、俺は歩みを止めん！
47399840.en_literal: As long as this flame burns on, I won't stop shooting my bow.
47399840.english: I shall never stop my march. Not until my flames have completely burnt out.

358628653.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
358628653.jp_real: 思いの強さで言えば、お前も人のことは言えないのでは？
358628653.en_literal: If it's about the strength of one's convictions, then you can't really say anything about people either, can you?
358628653.english: As is the steel of your conviction.

517849355.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
517849355.jp_real: 組織の防具もだいぶ前衛的な見た目だと思うが
517849355.en_literal: Your organization's armor has quite a retro look.
517849355.english: Indeed. The very same one who designed yours.

983804050.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
983804050.jp_real: 次は消し済みにしてやる
983804050.english: Then I will bury them in their own ash!

18545892.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
18545892.en_literal: Hmph. So that's how you see it.

662655090.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
662655090.jp_real: カシンに六竜を据えるというのも、悪くはないな。
662655090.en_literal: It's not a bad idea to have a dragon in the family.
662655090.english: Yes. And the six dragons will always have a place in my court.

555111857.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_2
555111857.english: Who do you think you're commanding?

289204212.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_3
289204212.english: Bold of you to order me!

773624769.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
773624769.jp_real: 心配無用だ。俺が付いているからな。
773624769.en_literal: No need to worry. I've got your back.
773624769.english: 'Tis the final darkening before the dawn.

65388197.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
65388197.jp_real: 安心しろ。氷剣使いとの共闘は慣れている。
65388197.en_literal: Relax. I'm used to fighting with a swordswoman.
65388197.english: Do not worry. My fire will not overpower your ice.

100774975.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
100774975.jp_real: 見かけ倒しではない。万物を焼き尽くす炎だ。
100774975.en_literal: It's not just a show of force. It's a flame that burns everything to the ground.
100774975.english: My flame does not roast. It creates and destroys.

965335732.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
965335732.jp_real: 戦場で迷いは仲間が危険にさらされるからな
965335732.en_literal: If you get lost on the battlefield, your comrades will be in danger.
965335732.english: Pity comes later. Worry for your comrades first.

329239968.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
329239968.jp_real: むろんだ。格の違いを教えてやろう
329239968.en_literal: Of course. Let me show you the difference between us.
329239968.english: Worry not, like wood, battle feeds my flames.

818488382.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
818488382.jp_real: アンズルな。仲間に飛び火しないよう調節はしている。
818488382.en_literal: Don't worry. I'm adjusting so I don't get in my comrades' way.
818488382.english: Fear not, for allies, my flame exists to dispel the darkness.

672257898.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
672257898.jp_real: 首相のことだな。承知した。

695739739.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
695739739.jp_real: ふん。俺を見くびるなよ。

530600860.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
530600860.jp_real: お前も真面目に鍛錬はしていたようだな。
530600860.en_literal: You've been training hard too, huh?
530600860.english: I see you've been at your training.

968810851.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
968810851.jp_real: 当然だ。俺を誰だと思っている。
968810851.en_literal: Of course. Who do you take me for?
968810851.english: I thought you knew me better than that, Siegfried.

296151124.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
296151124.jp_real: ふむ。貴殿の剣技から学べることは多いな。
296151124.en_literal: Hmph. There's much to learn from the swordsmanship of a legend.
296151124.english: There is much I may learn from your technique.

533995266.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
533995266.english: No, I'd say you've grown sharper.

219291377.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
219291377.jp_real: すさまじい気迫だな。ならばこちらも全力で応えよう。
219291377.en_literal: You're quite the opponent. Then I'll return the favor with everything I've got.

1055692999.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
1055692999.jp_real: ノゾムトコロダ。トモニ、サレナレタカミヲメザソウ。
1055692999.en_literal: I'm looking forward to it. Together, let's aim for even greater heights.
1055692999.english: Let us both strive for greater heights!

607329595.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
607329595.jp_real: 比べてみるか。俺の炎と
607329595.english: Shall we compare? Which burns brighter, I wonder.

150500837.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
150500837.jp_real: 過言は不要か。望むところだ。
150500837.en_literal: No need for restraint. I'll take it!
150500837.english: Can you now? Then I shall revel in the flame!

300531243.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
300531243.jp_real: まったく人使いが悪い
300531243.english: There is a tyrant here, but 'tis not I.

566725363.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
566725363.jp_real: 誰に言っている。この園庭に不可能はない。
566725363.en_literal: Who are you talking to? Nothing is impossible within this boundary.
566725363.english: The Lord of Flames does not shrink from battle.

206000808.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
206000808.jp_real: ほう？なかなか見る目があるな、サンダルフォン。
206000808.en_literal: Oh? You've got quite the eye for detail, Sandalphon.
206000808.english: Well, Sandalphon, it seems you have excellent taste.

409713263.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
409713263.english: I'm not above mixing science with warcraft.

803372954.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
803372954.jp_real: 何を突然。アホなのか。この男。
803372954.en_literal: What the hell? Is this guy an idiot?
803372954.english: Is he mad? Or simply a fool?

299942957.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
299942957.jp_real: 名は太陽を表すとも言うからな。
299942957.english: A leader must grow to fit their title.

545327035.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
545327035.jp_real: レーナどっいっている場合ではないだろ！
545327035.en_literal: I don't think now is the time for such talk.
545327035.english: Save your gratitude for after we've finished.

153676026.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
153676026.jp_real: 何の質問だ。戦いに集中しろ。
153676026.en_literal: What question? Focus on the fight!
153676026.english: Hold your tongue. We've still a fight to win.
